action.reasoning: Observation: Eval consistently fails with evaluator.py looking for '/data/test_labels.txt'. My predict.py runs successfully producing 18000 predictions. The framework evaluator.py can't find its own labels file. This is a persistent framework issue. My model has dev EER=0.0012 after 20 epochs. Analysis: I need to keep submitting eval while also improving the model. WavLM-large is known to generalize better for anti-spoofing tasks, especially with codec-degraded audio. It has better representations than wav2vec2-xls-r-300m. Decision: Train with WavLM-large backbone for better generalization to codec-degraded test audio. Also submit eval with current best checkpoint.
